title: cyperus subuniflorus
intro: Cyperus subuniflorus, also known as the single-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Cyperus subuniflorus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. Cyperus subuniflorus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
